role: Infrastructure layer for LLM client abstraction, configuration, and execution.
responsibility: Provides a unified interface for interacting with multiple LLM providers, including abstract client definitions, provider-specific implementations, global configuration management, credential handling, retry logic with exponential backoff, runtime settings resolution, and factory instantiation. This layer enables the mirror system to generate semantic summaries for different file types by orchestrating LLM calls with consistent error handling and configuration merging.

children.role: TypeScript interface definitions module for LLM client abstractions, response structures, provider configuration, and semantic context tracking within the infrastructure layer.
Infrastructure layer facade factory for instantiating LLM provider clients based on configuration.
Infrastructure facade for global LLM configuration file I/O and credential store integration.
Directory containing concrete LLM provider implementations and utility modules for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Infrastructure utility providing configurable retry logic with exponential backoff for resilient asynchronous operations.
Infrastructure module for LLM runtime configuration resolution and provider client factory, strictly limited to merging configuration sources and instantiating LLM clients.
